dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: Verified end-to-end with a fresh temp Furrow root: `row archive` fails without `--supersedes-confirmed`, fails with wrong commit or row using the specific mismatch message, and succeeds with `e4adef5:pi-step-ceremony-and-artifact-enforcement`; in-repo evidence also shows `.furrow/rows/pi-adapter-foundation/state.json` archived, `gates/review-to-archive.json` has `phase_a.notes` echoing the confirmed pair and an empty blockers array, `bin/frw validate-definition` passed for all existing `definition.yaml` files, `row list --active --json` omits `pi-adapter-foundation`, and `.furrow/.focused` points to `pi-row-audit-cleanup`.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: New helper/blocker logic is unit-tested in `internal/cli/row_workflow_test.go`, but there is no automated CLI/archive test covering the new `--supersedes-confirmed` missing/mismatch/match branches in `runRowArchive` despite those being required acceptance-path behaviors.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: The specified interface contracts are present at the required locations: optional top-level `supersedes` in `schemas/definition.schema.json`, `pi-adapter-foundation/definition.yaml` names commit `e4adef5` and row `pi-step-ceremony-and-artifact-enforcement`, `furrow row archive` parses `--supersedes-confirmed`, `rowBlockers()` emits `supersedence_evidence_missing`, and the dangling-successor section was removed from `pi-step-ceremony-and-artifact-enforcement/handoff.md`.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: The reviewed range includes unrelated files outside the supersedence/archive deliverable scope with no justification in the supplied changes, including `internal/cli/row_repair.go`, `internal/cli/row_repair_test.go`, `internal/cli/review.go`, `.furrow/rows/pi-step-ceremony-and-artifact-enforcement/repair-*`, `.furrow/seeds/seeds.jsonl`, and `.furrow/rows/pi-row-audit-cleanup/specs/pi-step-ceremony-backfill.md`.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: Project-style checks are clean on the touched supersedence codepath: `go test ./internal/cli -run 'Test(RowBlockers_Supersedence|DefinitionSupersedes)$'` passed, `deae992` applied `gofmt`, and `bin/frw validate-definition` succeeded for all row definitions including the new `supersedes` field.
